human_verification.notes: Reviewed boundary controls, education and research source mapping, workflow/approval refusal logic, and scenario-to-ability coverage for student services support readiness.

review_notes: All required scenario families are covered.
All required abilities are mapped and validated.
No uncovered scenario IDs remain in functionality coverage.

specialist_owned_evidence: Scope is explicitly bounded to service/support coordination and not academic grading, ethics adjudication, or legal authorization.
Public sources are mapped to workflow stages and refresh/decay cadence requirements.
Scenario set includes policy exceptions, low-confidence requests, adjacency handoffs, and repeat failures.
Deployment package and rollout/rollback expectations are documented for validated rollout.
notes: specification-based runtime is documented as the default for this package. Trusted built promotion requires separate explicit approval.
Rollout to trusted built mode must be predicated on demonstrated stable execution and tenant-level signoff.
